title: Hello World Express App
prompt: create a hello world express app

steps.code: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const pkg=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json','utf8')); pkg.scripts={...pkg.scripts,start:'node index.js'}; fs.writeFileSync('package.json', JSON.stringify(pkg,null,2)+'\n');"
node index.js & pid=$!; sleep 2; curl -fsS http://localhost:3000/ | grep 'Hello World!'; kill $pid
